snippet.title: Har Baar (Official Lyric Visualiser) - Murtaza Qizilbash | Samar Jafri
snippet.description:
Har Baar is the outcry of two yearning minds, intertwined in a fight between complaining and making amends. The heart wants what the heart wants and will think to the brink of exhaustion, hoping to get a glimpse of the love it chases. To all the yearners, this song is for you.

- MQ and SJ

snippet.title: [URDU] 2026 PMGO Season 1 South Asia Finals | Day 4
snippet.description:
2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN SEASON 1 SOUTH ASIA FINALS - Day 4 ki official broadcast mein khush aamdeed 🔥

snippet.description:
Pass Ja Na Sake – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---



Itne kareeb hokar bhi…
hum pass ja na sake.

Dil me mohabbat bahut thi…
par lafzon me
kabhi keh na sake.

“Pass Ja Na Sake”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo kisi ko
beinteha chahta tha…
par us tak
kabhi pahunch na saka.

Is gaane mein
mohabbat bhi hai,
khamoshi bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

hum chah kar bhi
tere ho na sake…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
dil se chaha ho
par uske pass ja na paaye ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

localized.title: Pass Ja Na Sake – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
localized.description:
Pass Ja Na Sake – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---



Itne kareeb hokar bhi…
hum pass ja na sake.

Dil me mohabbat bahut thi…
par lafzon me
kabhi keh na sake.

“Pass Ja Na Sake”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo kisi ko
beinteha chahta tha…
par us tak
kabhi pahunch na saka.

Is gaane mein
mohabbat bhi hai,
khamoshi bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

hum chah kar bhi
tere ho na sake…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
dil se chaha ho
par uske pass ja na paaye ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.
